title: CD-I Pokemon Tournament Part 3 Mario VS Bowser
description:
Same pokemon battle rules as the part 2, but I added few stuff.

Few pokemon now have items, but no recovery items which would simply slow down the video having to make a healing animation each turn.

I will now use alot more the pokemon ability, happy? ;)

I also added a VERY rare Dodge/Counter, that's when a Pokemon dodge a move and automatically use a move as a counter this do not count as a turn so he can still attack during his turn.

I decided to add new moves that will never be in the game sadly. XD

Legendary Shiny pokemon are ALOT stronger that the normal legendary as you can probably see in this video some people might say they're WAY to strong, but they're far from be invincible they're just very cheap.

Of course Arceus cannot spam that Flame of Judgment move which is an instant kill unless it's dodged or beated by a greater powerfull move he must rest for 3 turns after using it leaving him extremely defenceless.

Anyway, I did put more effort in this part and I will now take a small pause of 1 week to play videos game and then I will start part 4.

Don't worry I'm not going to die for another 6 months again....YET!

Also, I left a secret in the video at the beginning of the battle you can see Morshu with the other character watching the battle, but at the end he's gone, but  where? I added him somewhere if you can find him without help you have good eyes and reflex. ;)

*SONG LIST*

1: Legend of Zelda Majora Mask - House theme (Also used in OOT)
2: Left 4 Dead - Witch Theme
3: Left 4 Dead - Death Theme
4: Pokemon HeartGold/SoulSilver - Team Rocket battle theme
5: Super Mario World - The Evil King Bowser
6: Pokemon Black & White 2 - Black Kyurem Battle
7: Pokemon HeartGold/SoulSilver - Ho-Oh Battle [Enhanced Remix]
8: Final Fantasy XIII-2 - Invisible Depths
9: Queen - 'We Are The Champions'

*END OF THE SONG LIST*
